trivia_bullets.text: Notion Rain is a Dimir guild card from Guilds of Ravnica (October 2018), carrying a Dimir watermark. Surveil was the Dimir mechanic, designed by Erik Lauer's team as a scry variant routing discarded cards to the graveyard -- cross-synergy with Izzet jump-start and Golgari undergrowth was intentional.

Flavor text: 'City air is a constant drizzle of private thoughts.' Thoughts-as-atmospheric-precipitation; knowledge as ambient pollution. The surveil mechanic and the 2-damage drawback both fold into the metaphor -- information-gathering has a cost.

Functions as Dimir-colored Read the Bones: surveil 2 replaces scry 2, routing discarded cards to the graveyard. Pauper and PauperCommander legal; saw genuine Pauper play in Dimir surveil/control builds. EDHREC rank 8,102.

Wizards' Guilds of Ravnica mechanics article describes surveil as 'a subtle mechanic that helped you win in ways that were not so overtly obvious -- the perfect Dimir mechanic.' Designers initially explored a true scry variant ('dark scry') but abandoned it to avoid confusion.
